name: golang-github-googleapis-gax-go-dev
title: golang-github-googleapis-gax-go-dev
description:
Google API Extensions for Go
Google API Extensions for Go (gax-go) is a set of modules which aids
the development of APIs for clients and servers based on gRPC and Google
API conventions.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-googleapis-gax-go-dev because Google API Extensions for Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-googleapis-gax-go-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-googleapis-gax-go-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-googleapis-gax-go-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
